hero.name: Cándido Aguilar
hero.description: My approach combines backend robustness with the agility of modern architectures and AI agent orchestration.

about.paragraph1: Senior Full-stack Engineer with a core focus on building robust, scalable, and secure software. My career has specialized in designing high-availability critical platforms for international government procedures and consular services.

about.paragraph2: I have extensive experience developing complex transactional workflows and ensuring data integrity under strict security standards, seamlessly integrating enterprise environments like SAP and large-scale payment gateways.

about.paragraph3: Driven by technical evolution, I rigorously apply Hexagonal Architecture and DDD patterns, bridging enterprise ecosystems like .NET 8 / Java with the cloud-native agility of Node.js, asynchronous messaging with Apache Kafka, and emerging local AI agent orchestration.

experience.description: Development and maintenance of a critical large-scale government services platform for managing international procedures and transactions.
details: Development of architecture and technical evolution of government platforms.
Integration of payment gateways and E2E user flows (UI to Backend).
Backend with Groovy/Grails and build automation with Gradle.
Dynamic interfaces with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Bootstrap.
Deployment and management of WAR applications on Apache Tomcat servers.
Version control and technical collaboration using GitHub.

experience.description: Development of systems for consular and internal management, integrating SAP ecosystems and optimizing document processes in high-security environments.
details: Backend development with Java, Groovy, and Grails (v2 to v5) under MVC architecture.
Digitization of consular procedures and management of administrative flows.
Development of monitoring panels and internal management tools.
Integration and synchronization of data with SAP business systems.
Optimization of processes for the validation of official documentation.
Maintenance and deployment of WAR applications on Linux servers.
Implementation of payment gateways in highly critical systems.

experience.position: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science in Software Engineering
details: Developed a local-first medical assistance system using proximity-based communication between mobile and physical hardware (Snips) without internet dependency; the technological foundation for the 'Acho' assistant at University of Extremadura (UEx).

projects.title: ChronosNote
projects.description: AI-powered, offline-first intelligent workspace. Implements strict multi-tenant user data isolation, asynchronous background processing, and a robust continuous integration pipeline.

projects.title: RetroVault
projects.description: E-commerce with Hexagonal Architecture and DDD. Asynchronous communication via Kafka and Saga pattern.

projects.title: AXON-OS
projects.description: Declarative AI agent orchestrator with Fastify backend, local Ollama LLM engine, and interactive Next.js + React Flow UI.

projects.title: NoteStack
projects.description: Cloud-native task manager with React Native. Real-time synchronization and secure architecture.

projects.title: Candido Stack
projects.description: High-performance professional portfolio. Focused on asset optimization, certified accessibility, and modern architecture.
